label: Public-safe Lambeth / Thames cached sample pack
description: Cached public-source fixture pack for Gate 1. It uses small official-source samples and OSM-style context notes without live runtime API calls or operational claims.
limitations: This pack is a public-safe cached sample, not a live official data pull.
It must not be used as certified RAMS, emergency guidance, or work approval.
Labels are intentionally conservative and require current source checks before site work.

hazards.title: Brownfield and planning-history review
hazards.note: Cached Planning Data brownfield-land record BLR059 demonstrates how planning-history context can shape the review pack; current official records must be checked before relying on it.

hazards.title: River-edge and flood-context review
hazards.note: The Thames-side setting should trigger current flood-map and river-edge checks before any site-specific RAMS work.

hazards.title: Urban access and stopping constraints
hazards.note: Bridge approach, busier roads, and public-realm interfaces may constrain delivery, parking, and loading assumptions.

hazards.title: Pedestrian and cyclist interface
hazards.note: The pack flags likely public-interface constraints for review, not a confirmed traffic-management requirement.

hazards.title: Buried-services screening prompt
hazards.note: Urban utility density is plausible; current statutory plans and competent review are needed before intrusive works.
